topic: Consumer-facing software compliance and regulatory exposure
reader: product counsel preparing a short risk memo for leadership
use_context: A legal-regulatory overview that identifies applicable obligations, likely exposure points, and practical compliance boundaries.
expected_domain_adapter_traits: careful distinction between law and guidance
known_failure_modes: collapsing statutory text into generic policy advice
required_claims: what the sources do not settle
prohibited_overclaims: does not claim legal advice for every jurisdiction
does not treat one regulator's view as universal

source_packets.title: Statutory text and agency guidance
source_packets.summary: Captures the legal text and the regulator's current guidance on the covered conduct.

findings.statement: The obligation turns on how the product collects, stores, and discloses consumer data.
findings.decision_note: This is the central trigger for the memo's risk analysis.
failure_modes: treating the rule as purely procedural rather than conduct-based
misunderstandings: assuming internal process controls eliminate the legal trigger

findings.statement: The guidance distinguishes mandatory requirements from recommended best practices.
findings.decision_note: Keep the recommendation layer separate from the legal requirement layer.
failure_modes: presenting best practices as if they were mandatory
misunderstandings: reading all guidance language as binding

source_packets.title: Legal commentary and enforcement summary
source_packets.summary: Explains how practitioners read the rule and where enforcement risk has concentrated.

findings.statement: Recent enforcement attention has focused on incomplete disclosures rather than on technical implementation alone.
findings.decision_note: Use this as context, not as a substitute for the text.
failure_modes: equating commentary trend with binding enforcement rule

findings.statement: Counsel should confirm whether state-level overlays apply before finalizing the memo.
findings.decision_note: Flag state overlays as an unresolved boundary issue.
